title: Learning Entry
description: Schema for entries in _learnings/*.json files. All entries must conform to this base schema; individual files may extend it with additional required fields.

discovered_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this entry was created

tags.description: 1-5 domain keywords for filtering and relevance matching

promoted_to.description: If promoted, the destination path (e.g., 'config/mappings.json' or 'docs/agent.md'). Null if not yet promoted.

superseded_by.description: If this entry was corrected by a later finding, the later entry's summary. Helps compaction.
